steps.speaker: {attendant}
steps.text: Your Majesty, a singing troupe has come to pay their respects.

steps.speaker: {player}
steps.text: Singing?

steps.speaker: {attendant}
steps.text: Yes. They travel the stars performing concerts.

steps.speaker: {attendant}
steps.text: They are said to be a fairly famous song maiden troupe.

steps.speaker: {player}
steps.text: Hmm...

steps.speaker: {player}
steps.text: Very well. I will meet them.

steps.speaker: {attendant}
steps.text: Understood.

steps.speaker: {player}
steps.text: So you are the singing troupe.

steps.speaker: {manager}
steps.text: Yes, and thank you for permitting us to dock.

steps.speaker: {manager}
steps.text: I am Olivia's manager.

steps.speaker: {manager}
steps.text: And this is our song maiden, Olivia.

steps.speaker: {olivia}
steps.text: I am Olivia.

steps.speaker: {olivia}
steps.text: It is an honor to meet you, King {playerName}.

steps.speaker: {player}
steps.text: So you are the singer?

steps.speaker: {olivia}
steps.text: Yes.

steps.speaker: {manager}
steps.text: If possible, we would like permission to hold a concert on this planet.

steps.speaker: {manager}
steps.text: It should raise the morale of your troops.

steps.speaker: {player}
steps.text: Let me consider it...

steps.speaker: {player}
steps.text: Very well.

steps.speaker: {player}
steps.text: You have my permission.

steps.speaker: {manager}
steps.text: Oh, thank you.

steps.speaker: {olivia}
steps.text: We are grateful, King {playerName}.

steps.speaker: {player}
steps.text: I cannot allow it.

steps.speaker: {player}
steps.text: Your music is not to my taste.

steps.speaker: {player}
steps.text: You will not sing on this planet.

steps.speaker: {olivia}
steps.text: W-what...

steps.speaker: {player}
steps.text: You will leave this planet by tomorrow.

steps.speaker: {player}
steps.text: Otherwise you will be imprisoned on suspicion of spying.

steps.speaker: {manager}
steps.text: I see... That is unfortunate, but it cannot be helped.
